query:
-- Categorise the zero-revenue gap by root cause
-- Category 1: No billing items exist for the customer at all
-- Category 2: Billing items exist but no assignment (fuzzy match failed)
-- Category 3: Bundle billing item — revenue assigned to sibling service, not this one
SELECT 
  'No billing items for customer' as root_cause,
  COUNT(*) as service_count,
  SUM(s.monthlyCost) as total_cost
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND s.status = 'active'
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue IS NULL OR s.monthlyRevenue = 0)
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
  )

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  'Billing items exist but no assignment' as root_cause,
  COUNT(*) as service_count,
  SUM(s.monthlyCost) as total_cost
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND s.status = 'active'
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue IS NULL OR s.monthlyRevenue = 0)
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba WHERE sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
  )

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  'Has assignment (revenue should be set)' as root_cause,
  COUNT(*) as service_count,
  SUM(s.monthlyCost) as total_cost
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND s.status = 'active'
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue IS NULL OR s.monthlyRevenue = 0)
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba WHERE sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
  );

rows.root_cause: Billing items exist but no assignment
